items.title: Reverting Gemini Format Translation Changes in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the previous changes made to translate the Gemini format to OpenAI for upstream providers. Key modifications include adjustments to the configuration files and handler scripts, resulting in a reduction of code complexity. The rollback aims to restore the previous functionality while maintaining system stability.

items.title: Enhance Gemini to OpenAI Translation in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes the Gemini handler to properly translate Gemini format to OpenAI messages, addressing issues that caused 429 and 502 errors with upstream providers. Key changes include modifications to the Gemini API handler and configuration files, enabling seamless communication with OpenAI-compatible services. The new dual-mode forwarding supports both native Gemini and OpenAI formats, improving overall functionality.

items.title: Enhance Midjourney Imagine Plugin with V8 Parameters in Dify 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new V8-specific parameters to the Midjourney Imagine plugin, including model version selection, HD resolution mode, and quality settings. The YAML manifest and Python payload builder have been updated accordingly, allowing users to leverage advanced features like multi-reference blending and premium style flags. These enhancements aim to improve user experience and output quality.

items.title: Update VS Code Dispatch Target for ShortURL in M C P Short U R L 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the cross-repo dispatch target in the CI workflow from the combined VSCodeMCP repository to the dedicated VSCodeMCPShortURL extension repository. The change ensures that the correct extension rebuild is triggered, enhancing the deployment process for the ShortURL extension.

items.title: Update dispatch target for VSCode extension in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the cross-repo dispatch target in the CI workflow from the combined `VSCodeMCP` repository to the dedicated `VSCodeMCPNanoBanana` extension repository. The change ensures that the correct extension rebuild is triggered, enhancing the deployment process for the extension.

items.title: Update dispatch target for VSCode extension in M C P Seedance 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the cross-repo dispatch target in the CI workflow from the combined `VSCodeMCP` repository to the dedicated `VSCodeMCPSeedance` extension repository. This change ensures that the correct extension rebuild is triggered, enhancing the deployment process for the specific extension.

items.title: Update VS Code Dispatch Target for Seedream in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the cross-repo dispatch target in the CI workflow, shifting from the combined `VSCodeMCP` repository to the dedicated `VSCodeMCPSeedream` extension repository. This change ensures that updates are correctly routed to the appropriate extension, enhancing the deployment process.

items.title: Update VS Code Extension Dispatch Target in M C P Flux 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the cross-repo dispatch target, shifting from the combined `VSCodeMCP` repository to the dedicated `VSCodeMCPFlux` extension repository. This change enhances the deployment process for the VSCode extension, ensuring more streamlined updates and better management of the extension's lifecycle.

items.title: Update CI Dispatch Target for VSCodeMCPVeo in M C P Veo 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the CI workflow to change the dispatch target from the combined `VSCodeMCP` repository to the dedicated `VSCodeMCPVeo` extension repository. This change ensures that builds and updates are correctly directed to the appropriate extension, enhancing the deployment process.

items.title: Update dispatch target for VSCode extension in M C P Sora 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the cross-repo dispatch target in the CI workflow from the combined `VSCodeMCP` repository to the dedicated `VSCodeMCPSora` extension repository. This change ensures that builds and updates are correctly triggered for the specific extension, improving deployment accuracy.

items.title: Update dispatch target for VSCode extension in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the cross-repo dispatch target in the CI workflow from the combined `VSCodeMCP` repository to the dedicated `VSCodeMCPLuma` extension repository. The change ensures that the correct extension rebuild is triggered, enhancing the deployment process for the Luma extension.

items.title: Update dispatch target for VSCode extension in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the cross-repo dispatch target in the CI workflow, changing it from the combined `VSCodeMCP` repo to the dedicated `VSCodeMCPMidjourney` extension repo. This change ensures that the correct extension is triggered for rebuilds, enhancing the deployment process.

items.title: Update VS Code Dispatch Target in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the cross-repo dispatch target in the CI workflow from the combined VSCodeMCP repo to the dedicated VSCodeMCPSerp extension repo. The change ensures that the correct extension rebuild is triggered, enhancing the deployment process for the M C P Serp project.

items.title: Update dispatch target for VSCode extension in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the cross-repo dispatch target in the CI workflow, changing it from the combined VSCodeMCP repo to the dedicated VSCodeMCPSuno extension repo. This change ensures that updates are correctly routed to the appropriate extension, enhancing the deployment process.

items.title: Enhance V8 i18n Support for HD/Quality in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update adds essential V8-related translation keys for HD/quality features across all 17 locales in the Nexior project. Key additions include labels and tooltips for HD mode, standard, and ultra quality options, ensuring a consistent user experience for non-English speakers. This enhancement significantly improves accessibility and usability for a broader audience.

items.title: Enhance MCP prompts with V8 guidance in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Midjourney V8 feature documentation to the prompt templates, enabling LLMs to utilize the latest capabilities. Key features include HD mode, quality 4, style reference, moodboard, and associated cost multipliers. These enhancements aim to improve image generation quality and user experience.

items.title: Fix Gemini handler to prevent NoneType error in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the Gemini API handler to ensure the model is correctly retrieved from the URL path, preventing NoneType errors. The changes in the `get_forward_request_url` and `calculate_prompt_tokens` methods enhance the robustness of API requests by using the model from `path_kwargs` when available. This improvement will lead to more reliable interactions with the Gemini API.

items.title: New Claude Code Integration Guide for Cursor in Docs 🚀
items.summary: We've added a comprehensive guide for integrating Claude Code with Cursor, available in both English and Chinese. This new resource includes installation instructions, configuration details, and a comparison of Cursor's built-in AI features with the Claude Code extension. Additionally, the overview pages have been updated to reflect this new guide, enhancing user accessibility.

items.title: Enhance Cursor Documentation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new Cursor-specific guide and enhances existing documentation for Claude Code. Key changes include the addition of a dedicated guide in both English and Chinese, as well as updates to the overview and service introduction pages to incorporate Cursor details. These improvements aim to provide clearer instructions for users integrating Claude Code with the Cursor editor.

items.title: Automate VSCode Extension Updates in M C P Short U R L 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new job in the publish workflow that notifies the VS Code extension whenever a new version is published to PyPI. By triggering an automatic rebuild of the VSCodeMCP extension, it ensures that users always have access to the latest MCP server versions. This enhancement streamlines the update process and keeps the extension in sync with server changes.

items.title: Automate VSCode Extension Updates in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new job in the publish workflow that notifies the VSCodeMCP extension after a successful PyPI publish. It ensures that the extension is automatically republished with the latest MCP server versions, keeping the VS Code Marketplace in sync with updates. This enhancement streamlines the deployment process and improves user experience.

items.title: Automate VSCodeMCP Extension Updates in M C P Seedance 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new job in the publish workflow that notifies the VSCodeMCP extension after a successful PyPI publish. By dispatching an event, it triggers an automatic rebuild of the VS Code extension with the latest MCP server versions, ensuring synchronization between the extension and server updates. This enhancement streamlines the deployment process and improves user experience.

items.title: Automate VSCodeMCP Extension Updates in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new job in the publish workflow that notifies the VSCodeMCP extension after a successful PyPI publish. By dispatching an event, it triggers an automatic rebuild of the extension, ensuring it remains in sync with the latest MCP server versions. This enhancement improves the user experience by keeping the extension up-to-date seamlessly.

items.title: Automate VSCodeMCP Extension Updates in M C P Flux 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new job in the publish workflow that notifies the VSCodeMCP extension after a successful PyPI publish. By dispatching an event, it triggers an automatic republish of the extension with the latest MCP server versions, ensuring synchronization with updates. This enhancement improves the user experience by keeping the extension up-to-date seamlessly.

items.title: Automate VSCodeMCP Extension Updates in M C P Veo 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new job in the publish workflow that notifies the VSCodeMCP extension after a successful PyPI publish. By dispatching an event, it triggers an automatic republish of the extension with the latest MCP server versions, ensuring synchronization with updates. This enhancement improves the user experience by keeping the extension up-to-date seamlessly.

items.summary: This update introduces a new job in the publish workflow that notifies the VSCodeMCP extension after a successful PyPI publish. By dispatching an event, it triggers an automatic rebuild of the extension, ensuring it remains in sync with the latest MCP server versions. This enhancement improves the user experience by keeping the extension up-to-date seamlessly.

items.title: Automate VSCodeMCP Extension Updates in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new job in the publish workflow that notifies the VSCodeMCP extension after a successful PyPI publish. It triggers an automatic rebuild of the extension with the latest MCP server versions, ensuring that the VS Code Marketplace remains synchronized with any updates to the MCP server.

items.title: Automate VSCodeMCP Extension Updates in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new job in the publish workflow that notifies the VSCodeMCP extension after a successful PyPI publish. It triggers an automatic rebuild of the extension to ensure it remains in sync with the latest MCP server versions. This enhancement improves the user experience by keeping the extension up-to-date seamlessly.

items.title: Automate VSCodeMCP Extension Updates in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new job in the publish workflow that notifies the VSCodeMCP extension after a successful PyPI publish. By dispatching an event, it triggers an automatic republish of the extension with the latest MCP server versions, ensuring synchronization with updates. This enhancement improves the user experience by keeping the extension up-to-date seamlessly.

items.title: Automate VSCode Extension Updates in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new job in the publish workflow that notifies the VSCodeMCP extension after a successful PyPI publish. By dispatching an event, it triggers an automatic rebuild of the VS Code extension, ensuring it remains in sync with the latest MCP server versions. This enhancement improves the user experience by keeping the extension up-to-date seamlessly.

items.title: Introducing Gemini Generate Content API in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the Gemini Generate Content API with a native format, including a new API record, cost rules, and an OpenAPI specification. Additionally, comprehensive tests have been implemented to ensure functionality and reliability. These enhancements will streamline content generation processes and improve integration capabilities.

items.title: Enhance Midjourney Imagine Tool with V8 Parameters in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for Midjourney V8 parameters in the imagine tool, including options for version, HD, quality, style reference, and moodboard. A new MidjourneyVersion type has also been added to streamline version management. These enhancements will improve user experience by providing more customization options for image generation.

items.title: Exciting Midjourney V8 Alpha Features Added in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for Midjourney V8 Alpha in the Nexior frontend, featuring a new HD toggle and an Ultra quality option. Key changes include the addition of billing metadata fields in API requests and enhancements to the version selector. Users can now enjoy improved image generation capabilities with auto-detection of style references and moodboards.

items.title: Enhance Midjourney V8 Alpha Billing Support in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces billing support for Midjourney V8 Alpha premium features, implementing cost rules for various combinations of features. The new rules specify that using HD or quality 4 incurs a 4x cost, while using both together results in a 16x cost. Additionally, 9 new tests have been added to ensure all functionalities are working correctly, with all tests passing successfully.

items.title: Enhance Gemini Handler for Billing Data in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update includes the model from the URL path in the record response and metadata for gateway billing. This enhancement allows the /record phase to evaluate model-specific cost rules for Gemini generateContent requests, improving billing accuracy and functionality.

items.title: Enhance Gemini API Support in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for the Gemini native API format during the gateway authentication phase. Key changes include path normalization for the Gemini generateContent endpoint and the extraction of the model from the request path into the payload for cost calculations. These enhancements improve the gateway's ability to handle dynamic path matching effectively.

items.title: Revamp Claude Code Integration Guides in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects inaccuracies in the Claude Code integration guides for JetBrains and Desktop App. Key changes include removing misleading configuration steps and clarifying that third-party API proxies are not supported in the Desktop App. Additionally, the FAQ has been updated to reflect these changes, ensuring users have accurate and helpful information.

items.title: Enhance Midjourney V8 Billing Parameters in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new billing parameters for Midjourney V8, including version, hd, quality, style_reference, and moodboard to the getRecordMetadata() function. Additionally, it fixes the auto-append behavior for --sref/--cref to ensure compatibility with V8. These enhancements will improve user experience and streamline billing processes.

items.title: Streamline AI Agent Instructions in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update consolidates AI agent instructions by making CLAUDE.MD the sole reference, removing approximately 270 lines of duplicated content. The copilot-instructions.md file has been significantly reduced from 428 lines to just 17, now serving only as a redirect to CLAUDE.MD. This change enhances efficiency by ensuring that all future edits will only need to be made in one location.

items.title: Enhance polling efficiency by aborting after 30 empty responses in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the polling mechanism by terminating the loop after 30 consecutive empty fetch responses, which typically occurs due to errors. This change reduces unnecessary waiting time from up to 61 minutes to approximately 2-3 minutes, enhancing overall system responsiveness. The fix is applicable to both version 1.0 and 2.0 of the polling loop.

items.title: Enhance API Testing Instructions in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update adds important reminders in both `.github/copilot-instructions.md` and `CLAUDE.MD` regarding the use of `ACEDATACLOUD_API_TOKEN` for testing live APIs. Users are now instructed to load the token from `.claude/.env` to ensure secure and proper API testing on `api.acedata.cloud`. These changes aim to improve the testing process and prevent hardcoding sensitive information.

items.title: Enhanced Retryable Status Codes in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update expands the `RETRYABLE_STATUS_CODES` to include 401, 404, 429, and 500, alongside the existing 502, 503, and 504. This change improves error handling by allowing retries for additional error scenarios, ensuring better resilience in the service. It addresses specific 500 errors encountered with Claude's /v1/messages endpoint, enhancing overall reliability.

items.title: Enhanced buyback data accuracy in Roadmap 🚀
items.summary: This update backfills the ace_bought amounts and timestamps using on-chain data from Solana RPC for all 12 buyback transactions. Key entries have been added, including a new buyback on March 9, totaling 123,582.95 ACE. Additionally, placeholder timestamps have been replaced with accurate on-chain block times, improving data reliability.

items.title: Fix jobId usage for partner fetch endpoint in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the API call for fetching partner video jobs by using 'jobId' instead of 'job_id'. Additionally, it enhances the publishing process for various platforms, ensuring that drafts are now published live. Key changes include updates to the publishing steps for Zhihu, CSDN, JueJin, CNBlogs, Dev.to, and Medium.

items.title: Enhance Gemini API Streaming and Model Transform in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses two critical issues in the Gemini native API handler for the OpenAI worker. It improves streaming detection by checking both query parameters and request paths, ensuring proper handling of `generateContent` and `streamGenerateContent` endpoints. Additionally, it adds model name normalization for `gemini-3.0-flash` and `gemini-3-flash`, aligning with existing configurations to prevent potential failures.

items.title: Unleashing 6 Advanced Multimodal Workflows in Dify 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces six new advanced multimodal workflow templates in the Dify platform, enhancing automation capabilities across various scenarios. Key workflows include AI-driven video production, e-commerce marketing suites, and intelligent proposal generation, all leveraging multiple AI services for streamlined processes. These templates can be easily imported and utilized, significantly improving user experience and efficiency.

items.title: Updated AceDataCloud Plugins to Align with OpenAPI Specs in Dify 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances eight AceDataCloud Dify plugins by aligning them with the latest OpenAPI specifications. Key improvements include the addition of missing parameters and models for plugins such as Suno, Seedance, Veo, and others, ensuring better functionality and user experience.

items.title: Automate Dependency Updates in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot to automate dependency management for npm, pip, Docker, and GitHub Actions. With weekly updates for npm and pip, and monthly updates for Docker and GitHub Actions, this change enhances the project's maintenance and security posture.

items.title: Automate Dependency Updates in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot to automate dependency management for npm packages, Docker images, and GitHub Actions. npm packages will be updated weekly, while Docker images and GitHub Actions will receive monthly updates. This enhancement aims to keep the project dependencies up-to-date and secure.

items.title: Enhance CI with OpenAPI and Cost File Validation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new validation script for OpenAPI specifications and cost files into the CI pipeline. The script checks for JSON syntax, OpenAPI structure, and ensures that cost files are correctly formatted and cross-referenced. This enhancement aims to catch errors before they reach the database, improving overall data integrity.

items.title: Enhance Kong Gateway Config Management in Platform Deployment 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new tool for managing Kong gateway configurations, including export, diff, and validate commands. The addition of `kong_config.py` and updates to the README facilitate tracking configurations in Git, marking a significant step towards a GitOps workflow for Kong. This tool will streamline configuration management and improve deployment processes.

items.title: Enhance CI with ESLint and Prettier Checks in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new lint job in the CI pipeline that runs ESLint and Prettier on modified TypeScript service workers. The linting process runs in parallel with the existing Docker build and is initially set to be non-blocking, allowing for gradual codebase improvements. This enhancement aims to maintain code quality and consistency across the project.

items.title: Enhance CI with Migration Check in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new step in the CI pipeline to check for uncommitted database migrations using the `makemigrations --check --dry-run` command. By implementing this check, we can prevent potential deployment failures caused by schema mismatches, ensuring a smoother development process.

items.title: Exciting New International Publishers Added in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces five new international platform publishers: Hashnode, Telegraph, LinkedIn, Blogger, and WordPress. Alongside these additions, 19 existing test failures have been resolved, and 61 new tests have been implemented to ensure robust functionality across all platforms. The total number of passing tests now stands at 578, enhancing the overall reliability of the publishing system.

items.title: Enhanced Nexior Deployment Tutorials with Screenshots in Backend 🚀
items.summary: All four Nexior deployment tutorials have been enriched with CDN-hosted screenshots, enhancing the user experience. Each tutorial now features 8-10 images that cover essential steps such as GitHub Fork flow, platform login pages, and site configuration. New platform-specific screenshots have also been added for Netlify, Zeabur, Docker, and Tencent Cloud, ensuring comprehensive visual guidance.

items.title: Enhance error logging for partner video status in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves error handling in the getSoraPartnerVideoJob function by explicitly logging the HTTP error response status and data. Previously, only the raw error object was logged, which could obscure important debugging information. This change enhances visibility into API errors and aids in troubleshooting.
